    Methods in org.apache.juneau.http.header that return HttpStringHeader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HttpStringHeader
    HttpStringHeader.of(String name, String value)
    Creates an HttpStringHeader with the given name and value.
    static HttpStringHeader
    HttpStringHeader.of(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier)
    Creates an HttpStringHeader with the given name and lazy value supplier.
    static HttpStringHeader
    HttpStringHeader.ofPair(String pair)
    Parses a header line of the form "Name: value" (or "Name=value") into an HttpStringHeader.

  • Uses of HttpStringHeader in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.rest.server.httppart that return HttpStringHeader
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    HttpStringHeader
    RequestHeader.asStringHeader()
    Returns the value of this header as an HttpStringHeader.
